## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Drama;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Drama { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
drama, masks, theater, theatre, entertainment, show

multimedia
